questions.text: What is the primary objective of cybersecurity?
options: To ensure computers run as fast as possible
To protect systems, networks, and data from digital attacks
To manage physical security of buildings
questions.answer: To protect systems, networks, and data from digital attacks

questions.text: Which of the following is considered sensitive organizational data?
options: Press releases posted on the company website
The address of the corporate headquarters

questions.text: In a data breach involving stolen credentials, what is the most immediate risk?
What term describes a cyber attacker who is motivated by political or social causes rather than financial gain?
Which of the following best defines cyberwarfare?
options: Two teenagers competing in an online video game
A company stealing trade secrets from a competitor
A nation-state conducting cyber attacks against another nation to cause disruption or damage
A localized virus infecting a single school network
questions.answer: A nation-state conducting cyber attacks against another nation to cause disruption or damage
